title: Simply Optimized: Options Respected
description:
The Simply Optimized modpack, but your options are respected.
All credit goes to HyperSoop, the creator of the original Simply Optimized modpack.
body:
[![simply-optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/simply-optimized_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/project/BYfVnHa7)

This modpack is the same as the same as the [Simply Optimized modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/BYfVnHa7), with the only difference being that your keybinds aren't reset when updating the pack.

Little to no quality-of-life or visual enhancements are included in the pack by default - you are expected to add any non-optimization mods you want yourself. (Other than [YOSBR](https://modrinth.com/project/WwbubTsV))

Any issues regarding keybind retention or crashes can be opened on [GitHub](https://github.com/TechPro424/SO-YOSBR/issues).

### Versioning 

The versioning format is <MC version>-x.y(.z), where

the MC version taken is the minor release the version of SO is for,
x is a mod list revision (addition/removal of a mod)
y is the config revision (incremented every time a config tweak is added or changed)
z is incremented when there's a version with only mod updates and little to no changes otherwise.
x.y.z is reset to 1.0.0 for every new MC release as different MC versions are very likely to have different mod sets available for them.

### Credits

All credit for the pack goes to [HyperSoop](https://modrinth.com/user/yafw9nhu), the creator of the Simply Optimized modpack.
